name: Grecian Green Beans Coca-Cola
recipeIngredient: 2 cans (16 oz each) small whole green beans, drained
2 shallots or small onions, peeled and thinly sliced into individual rings
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the garlic, parsley, sugar, oregano, mustard, salt, Coca-Cola, olive oil, and vinegar. Stir until the sugar is dissolved.
2. Add the green beans and shallots/onions; toss lightly with a fork.
3. Pack the mixture into 1 quart jar. Cover tightly.
4. Refrigerate several hours or overnight for the flavors to blend.
5. Serve chilled or as a hot vegetable with steak, hamburger, or meat loaf. Makes 1 quart.
